PROP-01b-partial1-inv-011.text: isValidSignature must enforce both sellTokenBalance and buyTokenBalance are BALANCE_ERC20.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-011.assertion: forall isValidSignature: order.sellTokenBalance==ERC20 AND order.buyTokenBalance==ERC20; else revert

locations.note: sellTokenBalance and buyTokenBalance BALANCE_ERC20 check at lines 171-172; reverts InvalidTokenBalanceMarker
